kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8080/ path_url=/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

kw.doc: Sets the log threshold to the specified level.

Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword
Openchrome
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
Openchrome
Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Test Setup

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: No Operation
kw.doc: Does absolutely nothing.

kw.name: Test Teardown
Capture Step ScreenShot
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Get Source
kw.doc: Returns the entire HTML source of the current page or frame.

kw.name: Create File
kw.doc: Creates a file with the given content and encoding.
Capture avec règle de nommage du fichier Le step permet d'identifier l'étape et de faire plusieurs captures par test

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
